name: miragon-modeler-collection
description: Model-based design in VS Code — BPMN, Team Topologies, Wardley Maps and Domain Storytelling in a single install.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with the Miragon Modeler Collection
walkthroughs.description: Four modeling lenses on your system — strategy, organization, process and domain.

steps.title: Strategy — Wardley Maps
steps.description:
Reason about the value chain and the evolution axis.
[Open the Wardley Maps tutorial](command:workbench.action.openWalkthrough?%22miragon-gmbh.wardley-mapping-modeler%23getStarted%22)

steps.title: Organization — Team Topologies
steps.description:
Map team types and their interaction modes.
[Open the Team Topologies tutorial](command:workbench.action.openWalkthrough?%22miragon-gmbh.team-topologies-modeler%23getStarted%22)

steps.title: Process — BPMN
steps.description:
Design BPMN 2.0 process diagrams in a native editor.
[Open the BPMN tutorial](command:workbench.action.openWalkthrough?%22miragon-gmbh.vs-code-bpmn-modeler%23getStarted%22)

steps.title: Domain — Egon.io
steps.description:
Capture domain stories in the language of the domain.
[Open the Egon.io tutorial](command:workbench.action.openWalkthrough?%22miragon-gmbh.egon-vscode-extension%23getStarted%22)
